name: Gentry School Bus Line
registry_source: TN Secretary of State (tnbear.tn.gov) - direct registry lookup not retrieved; company historical records cite Gentry Bus established 1952, incorporated TN 1978; in 2019 acquired by Olympus Car & Coach (now also operating under KTG School Bus Lines brand)
notes: FMCSA SAFER lookup matches Gentry Coach Company (legal name) with DBA 'Olympus Car & Coach'; input phone (865-522-2796) and Mitchell St address tie to the same operator (now operating from 2425 Burnside St, Knoxville per current MCS-150). MCS-150 dated 09/30/2024. Safety rating dated 11/08/2024. Authorized for Passenger operating authority. In 24 months: 6 vehicle inspections, 1 driver inspection, 0 OOS violations, 1 reportable crash (tow-away, no injuries).

name: ICC West Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: CA Secretary of State bizfile (bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov) - no direct hit retrieved via available search; FMCSA SAFER returned no records for 'ICC West' or 'ICC West Inc'
notes: No confident FMCSA SAFER match for 'ICC West Inc Which Will Do Bus' / 'ICC West Inc'. Input legal name is truncated/garbled (likely a CA out-of-state qualification phrasing 'which will do business in California as ...'). Address 4712 Admiralty Way PMB 1110 is a UPS Store mail-drop / PMB location (bizprofile.net shows 14+ registered entities at 4712 Admiralty Way), not an operating bus terminal - consistent with a registered-agent/PMB address rather than a true carrier base. No matching CA carrier with USDOT could be identified. Recommend direct bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov lookup of full legal name and search of CA PUC TCP/PSC permits for confirmation.

name: Best School Bus Inc
registry_source: NJDOE 2020-21 School Bus Contractor Codes (Bergen County, Region 5) confirms 'Best School Bus, Inc.' as an active NJ school bus contractor; NJ Division of Revenue business name search not retrievable via WebFetch
notes: FMCSA SAFER returned no records matching 'Best School Bus' or 'BEST SCHOOL BUS'. Listed input address (3 University Plz #110, Hackensack, NJ 07601) is a Class A multi-tenant office building (210,500 sf, 6-story); Suite 110 is consistent with a corporate office / virtual office address rather than a bus yard. Company IS confirmed as a Bergen County school bus contractor per NJDOE list. Likely operates buses from a separate garage location not in FMCSA database under this exact name, or operates intrastate only without needing federal USDOT (NJ intrastate carriers historically not required to register with FMCSA). Recommend NJ Sunbiz business name search and NJDOE PTRA filings for full details.

name: Kerry Bus Svc
inc_date: circa 1980 (per company website / Buzzfile - exact NJ Division of Revenue filing date unverified)
registry_source: NJDOE 2020-21 School Bus Contractor Codes confirms 'Kerry Bus Service' as an active NJ school bus contractor; NJ Division of Revenue business name search not retrievable via WebFetch
notes: FMCSA SAFER returned no records matching 'Kerry Bus', 'Kerry Bus Service', or 'Kerry Bus Svc'. Company confirmed as Kerry Bus Service Inc., located at 1667 E Landis Ave, Vineland, NJ 08361 (input address matches); also referenced at 629 E Wood St (likely secondary location). Operating since 1980, specializes in special-needs student transport, ~8 employees, women-owned (President Sharon Bruno). Estimated annual revenue ~$859K (Buzzfile); RocketReach lists higher figure but unverified. Likely operates intrastate only - NJ intrastate-only carriers historically did not require federal USDOT. Drivers count of 8 reflects employee count per Buzzfile/Manta, not FMCSA filing.

name: National Charter Bus Cleveland
entity_status: unknown - likely a sales/dispatch office of nationwide broker National Charter Bus, parent entity headquartered in Atlanta, GA
registry_source: OH Secretary of State business filings - no direct lookup retrieved; National Charter Bus parent is a nationwide motorcoach broker, not a Cleveland-headquartered carrier
notes: 'National Charter Bus Cleveland' is the regional sales/marketing brand of National Charter Bus (nationwide bus charter broker/marketplace). Listed Cleveland office is 1400 E 105th St Suite 103, Cleveland, OH 44106 (a leased suite in a multi-tenant building; not the input 'Downtown 44101' which appears to be an approximation). Two distinct FMCSA carriers found with 'NATIONAL CHARTER' in name: (1) NATIONAL CHARTER BUS LLC, Elburn IL, USDOT 4496933; (2) NATIONAL CHARTER INC, Gardena CA, USDOT 459073 - NEITHER is in Cleveland OH and the Cleveland brand does not appear to be a separately FMCSA-registered carrier. Bus service is delivered via partner motorcoach operators; National Charter Bus itself functions as a broker. Not a tuck-in target as a Cleveland-based fleet operator.
